metadata.description: Prepare the landing site with an excavated, sintered basaltic slab foundation required before anchoring inflatable tank systems.
metadata.intended_usage: Reference in mission profiles before any inflatable tank deployment.
metadata.author: AI Copilot

tasks.name: Site Prep — Sintered Foundation Slab
tasks.description: Excavate and sinter a basaltic slab foundation at the target site.
